programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In his first ever television interview, killer Thomas Gilbert, Jr. discusses the murder that shook New York's elite. The Princeton-educated Gilbert became a tabloid obsession when he shot his father after his $1,000 allowance was cut off. But in this unique installment of Interview With a Killer, Gilbert appears to be a far cry from his once golden upbringing. Host David Scott explores his long history of mental illness and the privileged pressure cooker that shaped his downfall.

programme.title: Wilderness Chronicles
programme.desc: Could dinosaurs still walk the Earth? Deep in the Congo, legends say yes. In this episode of The Wilderness Chronicles, Kyle Green investigates the chilling reports of Mokele-mbembe, a dinosaur-like creature said to inhabit the remote swamps of the Congo Basin. We dive into real expedition footage, indigenous stories, and eyewitness accounts that all point to one shocking possibility: something ancient may still be alive in the heart of Africa. From early missionary reports in the 1900s to modern explorers risking their lives to chase the unknown, we piece together the long-standing mystery surrounding alleged dinosaur sightings in Africa. Whether you're into cryptids, paleontology, or just love a good wilderness mystery, this episode will have you questioning what’s really hiding in the unexplored corners of the Earth.

Will the rifle survive—or fail under fire?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.desc: An imprisoned outlaw escapes and goes on the hunt for his brothers murderers, who just happen to be members of the outlaws own gang. He and his beloved hit the trail, but are pursued by local law enforcement, who have their own plans for justice. Starr...

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine...

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho are falsely accused of robbing a stagecoach. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wron...

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Two bandits impersonate Cisco and Pancho, sending the two to prison for robbery and murder. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they travel...

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho must prove their innocence when they are accused of killing the assistant to the sheriff in Bonanza.Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, followin...

programme.title: Jane Got A Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: Badge Without Honor
programme.desc: A U.S. deputy marshal saves Adam's life and reveals he wants to bring a friend of the Cartwrights to San Fran.

programme.title: The Spanish Grant
programme.desc: The Cartwrights strive to thwart the De La Cuesta family's land takeover.

programme.title: Feet Of Clay
programme.desc: A boy's convict father escapes prison, and the Cartwrights must protect him at the Ponderosa.

programme.title: The Trail Gang
programme.desc: About to set out on a cattle drive, Ben hires a young drifter named Sam Jackson as one of his drovers.

programme.title: Law of the Lawless
programme.desc: An 1880s judge (Dale Robertson) presides over a murder trial and the corruption that goes with it.

programme.title: Saddle the Wind
programme.desc: Retired gunfighter's (Robert Taylor) kid brother (John Cassavetes) takes to six-shooter.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Tom and his father are attacked by Hurons; Tom runs away in fear leaving his wounded father behind.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Ethan Allen and the Green Mountain Boys are at war with ruthless tax collectors.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E17 Henry Plummer
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Montana territory to investigate a wave of violent stagecoach robberies. He soon discovers that the crimes are being orchestrated by the local sheriff himself, forcing Clark into a dangerous showdown to expose Henry Plummer as the leader of the ruthless outlaws he was sworn to catch

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E7 - Lucas And A Rich Man Teach The Town Bully A Lesson
programme.desc: When a notorious and wealthy gunfighter arrives in North Fork, he intimidates the townspeople with his reputation and arrogance. Seeking to end the bully's reign of terror, Lucas McCain joins forces with an unlikely ally to humble the gunman and prove that intimidation cannot override the strength of a united community

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E 3 - End of A Young Gun
programme.desc: Lucas McCain takes in a young, rebellious drifter named Michael Anthony Northrup, hoping to provide him with the guidance he lacks. However, Lucas's efforts are complicated when the young man’s outlaw father arrives in town, intent on forcing his son to choose between a life of crime and the honest path Lucas has offered

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 6 Denver McKee
programme.desc: After a series of raids and cattle thefts plague the area, the Cartwrights seek the help of their neighbor, Denver McKee, a retired U.S. Deputy Marshal. While McKee leads various posses in search of the culprits, he remains suspiciously unable to find them. It is eventually revealed that McKee is secretly leading the outlaw gang responsible for the crimes, driven by a desperate need for money to provide for his daughter, Connie, who has recently returned home from school in the East

programme.title: Ben and Charlie 1972
programme.desc: In Ben and Charlie, Giuliano Gemma and George Eastman team up in a Spaghetti Western full of action, humor, and mischief. Ben, a smooth-talking drifter, and Charlie, a hot-tempered brawler, form an unlikely partnership as they stumble from one scheme to another across the frontier. Chased by outlaws, double-crossed by swindlers, and forever at odds with each other, the two rogues turn trouble into adventure at every turn. With sharp banter, lively gunfights, and offbeat charm, this buddy Western proves that friendship can be as wild as the West itself.

programme.title: Abilene Town (1946) Colorized : Randolph Scott
programme.desc: Randolph Scott stars in Abilene Town, a frontier drama of change, conflict, and courage. As homesteaders and cattlemen clash over land rights, Marshal Dan Mitchell (Scott) struggles to keep the peace in a town on the brink of chaos. Torn between lawless violence, shifting loyalties, and two women pulling at his heart, the marshal must decide where he stands as Abilene’s future hangs in the balance. With vivid characters, tense standoffs, and classic Western grit, this film captures the spirit of a town caught between the old West and the new.

programme.title: Stormy Trails
programme.desc: A rancher caught in the middle of a bank robbery shoots one of the robbers. However, the dead bandit turns out to be a former ranch hand who was suing him. The rancher is arrested for murder.

programme.title: Hands Across the Border
programme.desc: Horse breeders Adams and Brock are vying for the Army contract. After Adams is killed trying to ride his horse Trigger, Roy saves him from being shot. He trains him and then plans to ride him in the race to win the contract.

programme.title: Bounty Killer 1965
programme.desc: In Bounty Killer, Thomas Milian stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western of greed, betrayal, and bloodshed. When a drifter discovers the profitable trade of hunting men for money, he quickly rises as a ruthless bounty killer. But as his reputation grows, so do the dangers—outlaws, rival hunters, and his own thirst for power push him toward a violent reckoning. With stark desert landscapes, brutal gunfights, and the grit of Italian Western style, this tale shows the high price of killing for gold.
